channel.title: WoafyPet Care Guides
channel.description: Dog comfort, sleep and health guides

item.title: Senior Dog Joint Health: Daily Habits to Reduce Stiffness
item.description: Simple daily habits can make a meaningful difference in senior dog joint comfort. Learn how movement, traction, weight, and a supportive sleep setup can help reduce stiffness and improve rest.

item.title: What If Your Dog Refuses to Use a New Bed?
item.description: Some dogs hesitate when introduced to a new bed. Learn simple ways to help your dog feel comfortable and start using their new sleeping spot with confidence.
